g-0: ^EEC: I am glad to see you have come back so soon.
g-1: ^EEC: Now, before I can give you the first part to repair your ship, I must ask you to assist me with a small, little task.
g-2: ^EEC: Scattered all over the planet are orbs that look not that dissimilar from my own large eye.
g-4: ^EEC: I need you to collect them for me, Creature.
g-5: ^EEC: The other residents of this planet seem to have finally come to understand the importance of these orbs, the power that they hold.
g-6: ^EEC: They were mine first though, and I need them back.

g-1: ^EEC: I am so glad that we could come to a conducive compromise!
g-2: ^EEC: There is a Beavus close to this location, I believe it would be wise for you to start with him.
g-3: ^EEC: Return to me when you have collected the first Orb.
